text: Stepping inside this space, I am struck by the interplay of glass, light, and bold signage. The environment feels clinical yet energized by the vibrant glow from the room ahead. Entering the R+D zone intensifies the sensation—here, knowledge and curiosity are invited to intermingle. I feel a cautious optimism, a readiness to probe and question, as though on the threshold of new ideas and collaborative exploration. The presence of research makes me contemplative and eager for intellectual discovery.
